productDisplayName: Undercolors of Benetton Men Blue Boxer Trunks
description: Revel in the comfort of soft cotton with this trunk brief from undercolors of benetton. The superior cotton fabric provides breathability, while the cut offers easy leg movement. The double layered pouch enhances durability while you enjoy abrasion free comfort what with the brand label printed on the waistband. Crafted from 95% cotton and 5% elastane Broad and stretchable waistband in contrast colour that sits snug and comfortably Shaped to Fit doubled-layered contoured pouch Printed brand label on the front of the waistband for abrasion-free comfort Wash care Machine wash delicate at 30 degrees Do not bleach or dry clean Flat dry in shade Cool iron if needed Model statistics Product is a size M on a model with waist 34" and hips 38"
